raw.message: Explore a new world above the clouds and recruit dragons ☁️

hook.summary: Rapidly cycling through locked fantasy characters with interactive swipe prompts.
hook.visual_action: A barbarian, wolf-man, and blue-skinned woman appear behind chains and a padlock with directional arrows indicating a choice.

scene_flow: Initial view of a locked barbarian hero with swipe arrows and 'CLAIM YOUR HERO!' text.
Transition to a locked wolf-man warrior character in the same dungeon setting.
Transition to a locked blue-skinned female character wearing a wide-brimmed hat.
Rapid cycling through all three characters to emphasize the variety of heroes available to unlock.
audience_proxy: Mid-core fantasy RPG enthusiasts who enjoy character collection and the thrill of unlocking new heroes.
